results.title: Why is Iran bombing Gulf states while avoiding US naval assets and Israel?
results.description: Iran has adopted a strange and risky strategy in its ongoing conflict with the United States. As the US attacks on Tehran increase, they are responding, but surprisingly, they are targeting the military and civilian infrastructure of neighboring Gulf states such as Kuwait, Bahrain, and Jordan.

results.title: Nicaragua's Ortega says 'never again' for elections after two decades in power
results.description: Ortega, who has continuously held power since 2007 following an earlier presidential term in the 1980s, said the move will close off any path to the opposition, although he did not provide details about carrying out the ban

results.title: New Mexico signed $360K no-bid contract with D.C. PR firm for Epstein investigation
results.description: SKDK, known for its work in Democratic politics, has been paid around $110,000 since March through two separate contracts that total $420,000.
results.source: Santa Fe New Mexican Homepage | Santa Fe New Mexic

results.title: Chief: Decatur Police Department officer numbers improving
results.description: Police officer hiring numbers are finally showing improvement, Decatur Police Chief Torry Mack told the Personnel Board last week.

results.title: Fifth column
results.description: A court has freed Marine Le Pen to seek the French presidency. A victory would let a founding member corrode the European Union from within. A news cycle focused on the renewal of hostilities in the Middle East, the World Cup, the sharp fall in the value of tech stocks (particularly semiconductors), a change of [...] Fifth column was originally published on Emerging Europe .
